items.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
items.summary: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

items.title: SambaNova Completes First Close of $1 Billion Financing at $11 Billion Valuation
items.summary: PALO ALTO, CA, SambaNova has completed the first close of $1 billion in strategic financing as part of a Series F round, valuing the company at $11 billion post money.
